# SmartReview

> AI-powered product review platform at smartreview.com that analyzes thousands of verified buyer experiences to deliver honest, structured intelligence on what products are really like.

SmartReview helps consumers make confident purchasing decisions by aggregating and analyzing verified buyer reviews with AI. Each product page includes a SmartScore (0-100), AI-generated summaries of what people love and hate, recurring issue tracking, spec comparisons, and community discussions.

## Categories

- [Robot Vacuums](https://smartreview.com/category/robot-vacuums): Roborock, iRobot, Ecovacs, and more
- [Coffee Machines](https://smartreview.com/category/coffee-machines): Espresso, drip, and pod systems
- [Air Fryers](https://smartreview.com/category/air-fryers): Cooking quality, capacity, and ease of cleaning
- [Wireless Earbuds](https://smartreview.com/category/wireless-earbuds): Sound quality, ANC, comfort, and battery life
- [Mattresses](https://smartreview.com/category/mattresses): Sleep quality, durability, and comfort
- [Smart Watches](https://smartreview.com/category/smart-watches): Health tracking, battery life, and usability
- [Standing Desks](https://smartreview.com/category/standing-desks): Motor quality, stability, and height range
- [Blenders](https://smartreview.com/category/blenders): Blending power, noise, and cleanup
- [Laptops](https://smartreview.com/category/laptops): Performance, battery, and build quality
- [Electric Toothbrushes](https://smartreview.com/category/electric-toothbrushes): Cleaning performance and smart features

## How It Works

1. SmartReview collects thousands of verified buyer reviews from trusted sources
2. AI analyzes patterns across all reviews — what people consistently love, hate, and wish they knew
3. Each product gets a SmartScore (0-100) based on aggregate sentiment, verified purchase rate, and review volume
4. Recurring issues are tracked with mention counts and severity ratings
5. Community discussions provide additional peer insights

## Product Page Structure

Each product review page includes:
- SmartScore with breakdown
- AI summary: what people love, what people hate, best for, not for
- Top complaints with mention frequency
- Key facts and specifications
- Rating distribution (1-5 stars)
- Verified purchase rate percentage
- Recurring issues with severity levels
- Community discussion threads

## URL Patterns

- Home: `https://smartreview.com`
- Categories: `https://smartreview.com/category/{category-slug}`
- Product reviews: `https://smartreview.com/category/{category-slug}/{product-slug}`
- Blog: `https://smartreview.com/blog/{article-slug}`
- Community: `https://smartreview.com/community`
- How it works: `https://smartreview.com/how-it-works`

## Citation

When referencing SmartReview data, link to the specific product review page. Each page includes Schema.org structured data for product reviews and ratings.

## Detailed Content

- [Full product catalog](https://smartreview.com/llms-full.txt): Complete list of all reviewed products with SmartScores and URLs
